free_text: SCATTERING IN THE ENERGY RANGE 20 - 120 MEV.
143 MEV PULSED NEUTRON BEAM HITTING A
.LIQUID HYDROGEN IN COPPER WALLED CYLINDER, 25 CM
HIGH AND 20 CM DIAMETER. BEAM ENTRANCE AND EXIT
WINDOWS MADE OF 0.005 CM BERYLLIUM-COPPER FOIL.
TIME OF FLIGHT TECHNIQUE TO MEASURE ENERGY
BY A SOLENOID. ASYMMETRY IN SCATTERED NEUTRONS
MEASURED FOR BOTH IN ORDER TO ELIMINATE ASYMMETRIES
.BEAM POLARIZATION MEASURED BY SCATTERING FROM URANIUM
SYMMETRICALLY ABOVE AND BELOW THE BEAM LINE.
.ROTATION OF BEAM POLARIZATION BY THE SYNCHROCYCLOTRON
.TIME OF FLIGHT DEPENDENT DEAD TIME CORRECTION.
THE BEAM POLARIZATION ERROR IS AN ERROR IN THE
NORMALIZATION OF THE DATA POINTS. ALL OTHER
SYSTEMATIC ERRORS ARE NEGLIGIBLE COMPARED TO ERR-S.
